hotel_name: Nhà trọ & Pool Bar Bed Station Hội An " Trước đây là Sunflower" (Bed Station Hostel & Pool Bar Hoi An " Former Sunflower")

reviews.title: Ok but be careful!
reviews.text:
Place is ok, but really don't like the money hungry mindset here. Their bus & train tickets are 40% higher price then you can book yourself online for same bus/train companies...
Also make sure you remember if you put deposit down for key, as there was a lot of people complaining that they left deposit but at checkout they tell them they didn't
Other than that, place is ok if you like to party every night, no peaceful nights here.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Reception staff pretty bad

reviews.title: Very affordable stay with noisy bar
reviews.text:
I stayed at this hostel for 2 nights in Oct 2022. While it is very affordable as a solo traveller, the door of the dorm rooms had a squeaky sound and other visitors tend to party at the hostel's bar until 2-3am which made sleeping not as pleasant. If you love the nightlife, this might be for you.
The location, on the other hand, was quite convenient as it takes only a 20min walk to the central market. You may also rent their bikes if you wish to.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: What do you like? Nothing
reviews.negatives: A staff she sounds very unfriendly to customer

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Great value for the price. We stayed in a 6-bed female dorm but in practice there were only three of us, which was perfect. Bathrooms are mixed (men and women), which was a bit less comfortable, but overall it was a really good experience. We only stayed one night and it was exactly what we needed.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: You get what you paid for
reviews.negatives: Stuff sounds unfriendly

reviews.title: Great value and amenities
reviews.text: The property offers excellent value for money with great amenities like a pool bar. The location is convenient, and the staff are friendly. The cleanliness is well-maintained, and the hot water works perfectly. Overall, a solid choice for a comfortable stay.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Good location, great for partying if that is the vibe you’re going for.
reviews.negatives: Bathrooms needed care, very loud in the evening. Since it’s a party hostel, bound to attract some interesting characters.

reviews.title: Good Hostel!
reviews.text: Party. Good staff. Decent location.

location is nice, plenty of cafes around and it’s close to the center

stuff is nice

toilet wasn’t clean

reviews.title: The quality of the free breakfast is high.
reviews.text:
I stayed in a dormitory.

【Pros】
- The dormitory is spacious. There are no bed curtains, so there is almost no privacy.
- There are personal lockers (you need to bring your own lock).
- There is a small pool.
- There is an affordable restaurant on-site.
- There is a drinking water dispenser.
- There is a free breakfast buffet (no meat).
- There is a free cocktail time in the evening (15 minutes).
- The shower room and toilet are clean.

【Cons】
- There are no curtains on the beds, so there is no privacy.
- It is a bit away from tourist attractions, but still within walking distance.
- There is no kitchen available for guests, so you cannot use a refrigerator, microwave, kettle, etc.

Highly recommended for its cost-effectiveness.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives:
The hostel overall is decent, and the breakfast is good. The location is also fine — not very close to the Old Town, but still within a pleasant walking distance.

However, the service was quite disappointing. At check-in, the receptionist was noticeably rude and unwelcoming. Unfortunately, the same attitude was reflected by the staff member preparing the eggs at breakfast. She seemed unwilling to accommodate any requests outside of her usual routine.

For example, a guest before me asked for her eggs to be cooked a bit more, as they were too runny, and was told to mention it next time. When it was my turn, I asked for less oil, and she responded rudely, insisting that it would stick to the pan — even though it was clearly a good-quality pan that wouldn’t require much oil. She still prepared it her way. Interestingly, my friend later requested an omelet with less oil, and his request was respected.

On a positive note, one of the cleaning staff members was very kind and greeted me warmly, and a few receptionists were also polite. However, most of the staff seemed disengaged and unhappy in their roles, which unfortunately affects the overall guest experience.

As travelers who genuinely enjoy visiting Vietnam, it’s disappointing to have our experience impacted by this kind of service. It’s a shame, because with better staff attitude, this place could be much more enjoyable.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: The location is great, not far from the walking street of Hoi An Ancient Town's night market, with a swimming pool and bar, free buffet breakfast, plenty of public restrooms and showers, satisfactory air conditioning, and the front desk speaks decent English. The lobby has luggage racks and tables with benches. Although it’s not as new as Hoi An Ancient Lodge, the cost-performance ratio is still high. The pool water is warmed by the sun, and it’s very pleasant to lie on a beach chair soaking up the sun after swimming in the afternoon. The courtyard is large, making it convenient to park motorcycles. The lockers are a bit small; my backpack didn't fit in. Everything else is fine, and there’s a water purifier to fill up drinking water for free. I must say that the hotel industry in Hoi An Ancient Town has excellent service, affordable dining and accommodation, and a high cost-performance ratio, suitable for a laid-back stay. 😜

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives:
The hostel overall is decent, and the breakfast is good. The location is also fine — not very close to the Old Town, but still within a pleasant walking distance.

However, the service was quite disappointing. At check-in, the receptionist was noticeably rude and unwelcoming. Unfortunately, the same attitude was reflected by the staff member preparing the eggs at breakfast. She seemed unwilling to accommodate any requests outside of her usual routine.

reviews.title: Very clean hostel
reviews.text: I love staying here, a perfect hostel for solo travelers like me, easy to find and it’s in the tourist area just 1km from the ancient town. Free breakfast in the morning and free drinks from 6:30-7:30pm. I would definitely recommend this hostel.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: Basic place with a ~10 minute walk to the old town. Pool was OK. Free drinks special was pretty silly….why make people chug weak drinks for 15 minutes while standing in line? Buffet breakfast was alright. I was put into a crowded and dirty, smelly room when there were half a dozen other empty rooms. Teenage and early twenties backpackers would maybe get a kick out of this place. Alright for one night.

reviews.title: I want to keep it a secret.
reviews.text: It's my favorite in the world, but I don't want it to become popular and hinder my ability to visit again.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: The Sunflower is in an excellent location. A very social hostel and can be fun if that is what you're looking for. Just be aware of what you're signing up for ;).

reviews.title: One of the best hostels I've stayed at
reviews.text: Great value for money, lovely staff and great value for what you pay for! Definitely recommend.

reviews.title: Wonderful staff. Great breakfast and lots of fun!!!

reviews.positives: Nice vibe overall. Reception and bar staff are friendly and helpful. Not an overly "party" type place but has the potential if you so wish. Breakfast was basic but can't about free eggs and toast.

reviews.title: excellent
reviews.text: clean room. the dorm doesn't have curtains but it's safe, everyone. there is a swimming pool, a bar, and a board game area. I really like this place.

reviews.title: Great social hostel
reviews.positives:
Very helping staff I booked my tour with them. The reception staff were awesome at the time of check in they helped with all necessary details.
Room was spacious, nice buffet breakfast and they have pool and bar on the site aswell with free drinks in the evening. 
Very good for social meetups. I liked my stay here.
reviews.negatives: My room was on the top floor with no elevators, and it was a tough call with the luggage.

reviews.title: Exceptional Service and Comfort
reviews.text:
During my recent travels, I had the pleasure of staying at a hostel that truly exceeded expectations. From the moment I arrived, the atmosphere was welcoming, and the staff went above and beyond to ensure a comfortable stay.

Reception and Staff:
The front desk team was incredibly helpful, providing insightful local recommendations and ensuring a smooth check-in process. Their friendly demeanor set the tone for the rest of the stay.

Facilities:
The hostel was impeccably clean, with well-maintained common areas and dormitories. Amenities such as free Wi-Fi, a communal kitchen, and secure lockers added to the convenience.

Atmosphere:
What stood out was the vibrant community feel. Organized events and communal spaces made it easy to connect with fellow travelers, enhancing the overall experience.

Overall Experience:
This hostel provided not just a place to sleep but a memorable experience, thanks to its dedicated staff and excellent facilities. I would highly recommend it to anyone seeking quality accommodation with a personal touch.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Their staff was really good and helpful

reviews.title: Awesome hostel
reviews.text: Awesome place to stay

reviews.title: Best value accommodation in hoi an.
reviews.positives:
Staff team and volunteers were simply fantastic. Included breakfast was good, buffet style w multiple coffees possible. 😍

The 8 bed room was huge, and well equipped bed (lamp, sockets, shelf).

Free drink(s) at 6:45pm every day was a great incentive to meet other travellers.

I was there in low season (place was only at 10% capacity) which was perfect for me. If all 230 beds are full in high season , it must be quite a different, and intense, scene.
reviews.negatives: It's a long walk from old town and the beach. But it's not a real problem.... rent a bicycle or scooter through the hostel. Also Grab will get you there.

reviews.title: Cheapest but the best
reviews.text: I like it as a solo traveller who is bagpacking. The accomodation is superb and free breakfast is really helpful. Everyone is accomodating even the guest are friendly. The bar at the ground is a bonus. Will difinitely book here again.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Very helpful staff 🙏, Activities like pool, bilard , dart etc , clean room and restroom, good presure in showers, delicious all you can eat breakfast… and good location .. everything was perfect

reviews.title: Best Hostel
reviews.text: I came across it on Instagram and immediately made a reservation. After my stay, I felt it was the best hostel in Hoi An, offering numerous amenities at such an affordable price.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Great breakfast, pool and bar and it has a fun environment too! Very affordable price for the value they gave.
reviews.negatives:
It was okay, just the lady making the eggs seem unamused all the time. I dont know if she was always annoyed about something when people were asking her about some other requests. 

Also, the bikes/motorbike rent, it wasnt 24hrs so it doesnt make sense. Like if i rent at 5pm, should be returned at 10pm. Even the motorbike rent where you charge more when the motorbikes are brought to my son santuary or farther places. I haven't encountered that kind of weird policy.

reviews.title: Well done Bed Station
reviews.text: I would recommend this hostel.  It has an attentive staff and they keep the place clean.  It is a very social environment and you can meet many people from around the world.  It is about a mile or 15-20 minute walk from Hoi An Ancient Town.   Rental of bikes is fast and easy.  The breakfast was awesome.  I spent 4 days here and had a most enjoyable stay.  Thank you Bed Station and well done!

reviews.title: Tolles Team, wenig Privatsphäre
reviews.text:
Die Unterkunft liegt wirklich gut und das Personal ist super freundlich und zuvorkommend. Die Bäder waren immer sauber.
Die Betten sind jedoch typische Metallbetten mit harten Matratzen und ohne Vorhänge. Es gibt also wenig Privatsphäre und Rückzugsmöglichkeiten. Da das Hostel nicht ausgebucht war haben sie immer nur wenige Leute auf die Zimmer verteilt, das hat dann gut geklappt. Ich denke jedoch, dass für die Preisklasse Alternativen gibt.
